description_for_human: Shop intimate wellness products with discreet delivery in Uganda.
description_for_model: PleasureZone Uganda is an e-commerce store selling intimate wellness products including vibrators, lingerie, lubricants, couples toys, and wellness accessories. Based in Kampala, Uganda with same-day delivery in Kampala and nationwide shipping. All orders ship in plain, discreet packaging. Accepts Mobile Money (MTN, Airtel), cards, PayPal, and cash on delivery. Currency is UGX (Ugandan Shilling).
